reasoning: The question asks whether KHC's stock price will be higher than its October 26, 2025, closing price on three future dates (1 week, 1 month, and 3 months ahead). Stock prices behave largely as a random walk with a slight upward drift over time due to the equity risk premium. However, KHC has exhibited negative momentum over the past year and recently suffered a ~6.7% drop following a September 2025 split announcement, along with downward revisions to analysts' price targets (some as low as $23–$25). The upcoming Q3 2025 earnings report on October 29 introduces significant short-term volatility. Given the prevailing negative sentiment, I slightly favor the downside in the near term, but as the horizon lengthens, the probability mean-reverts toward 0.50 (reflecting increasing uncertainty and the generalized base rate that stock direction is nearly a coin toss over short-to-medium horizons).
